title: Brassicella pseudoerucastrum
taxonomy: Brassicella pseudoerucastrum is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Brassicella. This plant is classified as a member of the order Brassicales. Further classification places it as a member of the subfamily Brassicoideae. The plant's classification is closely related to other plants in the Brassicaceae family.
